seoTitle: Moonies Hill vs Moora — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moonies Hill and Moora. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Moonies Hill vs Moora: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moonies Hill and Moora.
heading: Moonies Hill vs Moora — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moonies Hill, Western Australia and Moora, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moora has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Moonies Hill (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moonies Hill or Moora safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moonies Hill has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Moora scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moonies Hill scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Moora scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moonies Hill or Moora?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moora has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
